entity.label: Betah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Confidence, a city belonging to Hadadezer, king of Zobah, which yielded much spoil of brass to David (2 Sam. 8:8). In 1 Chr. 18:8 it is called Tibhath.

nodes.label: Betah
nodes.description: Confidence, a city belonging to Hadadezer, king of Zobah, which yielded much spoil of brass to David (2 Sam. 8:8). In 1 Chr. 18:8 it is called Tibhath.

verses.text: And from Betah, and from Berothai, cities of Hadadezer, king David took exceeding much brass.
